subcodes.first_line: It behooveth the servant of God to arise for the Cause of God in the Days of God in such wise that naught shall veil him from aught beside Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ینبغی لعبد الله بان یقوم علی امر الله فی ایام الله علی شان لایحجبه ما سواه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God
